name: sixth-sense
description: Marketplace for Sixth Sense, a fork of obra/superpowers that adds model/effort routing, stack-aware conventions, and a two-pass adversarial reviewer (Dylan Dog).

plugins.name: sixth-sense
plugins.description: A fork of obra/superpowers built around explicit model and effort routing for every subagent, stack-aware conventions for Java, Angular, React, Next.js, and Python, and a two-pass edge-case reviewer (Dylan Dog) instead of a single review pass.
